title: Implement Prospects table, filters, and detail modal
description: Create the Prospects table page for Tiger Claw Scout dashboard with scoring, basic filters, and a detail modal wired to API endpoints described in the PRD.

steps.instruction: Create a React route for /dashboard/prospects that displays a table of prospects with columns: Name, Source, Score, Status, Last Contacted.
Define TypeScript types for prospects consistent with the PRD (including id, name, score, status, source, lastContactedAt, and any other required fields) and expose them from a shared types file.

Wire the Prospects table to fetch data from the backend API (e.g. GET /ai-crm/leads with query params for filters and pagination). Implement basic filters for status, minimum score, and source, and default sort by score descending.
Create a ProspectDetailModal component that shows detailed information for a selected prospect, including core fields and placeholders for scripts and recent activities.

Integrate the ProspectDetailModal into the /dashboard/prospects page so that clicking a row opens the modal. Fetch full prospect details from GET /ai-crm/leads/:id and handle loading/error states gracefully.
Run linting and tests to ensure the Prospects page and components compile and basic tests pass.
